name: ux-gremlin
description: Generate hostile-but-realistic UX resilience scenarios from normal web flows.

interface.shortDescription: Turn happy-path web flows into gremlin UX resilience test plans and starter Playwright specs.
interface.longDescription: UX Gremlin helps coding agents and QA workflows discover fragile web UX behavior by mutating normal happy-path flows into hostile-but-realistic scenarios for timing issues, reloads, stale state, auth edge cases, accessibility paths, interrupted flows, browser navigation, and recovery behavior.
defaultPrompt: Create a UX Gremlin plan for this web flow.
Validate the plan before generating Playwright.
Report suspected UX resilience bugs and recovery risks.
